name: neugence/whipscribe-mcp
description: MCP server for audio/video transcription via the Whipscribe API. Transcribes from a URL (YouTube, podcasts, direct media links) or local file; returns txt/json/srt/vtt/docx with optional speaker diarization and word timestamps. Hosted remote endpoint at `https://whipscribe.com/mcp` (Bearer auth) or local install via `uvx whipscribe-mcp`.
